name: Catalogizer Admin Operations Test Bank
description: Admin operations tests for system info, user management, storage, backup, logging, configuration, health, metrics, and access control

test_cases.name: Retrieve system info

steps.name: Request system info
steps.expected: 200 OK with version, build number, build date, Go version, OS info

test_cases.expected_result: System info returned with version and build metadata

test_cases.name: System info includes database status

steps.name: Request system info as admin
steps.expected: Response includes database type (sqlite/postgres), connection status

test_cases.expected_result: Database status included in system info

test_cases.name: System info includes uptime
test_cases.expected_result: Server uptime reported in system info

test_cases.name: List all users

steps.name: List users
steps.expected: 200 OK with array of user objects (id, username, role, created_at)

test_cases.expected_result: User list returned with expected fields

test_cases.name: Create new user

steps.name: Create user
steps._skip_reason: endpoint POST /api/v1/admin/users does not exist on catalog-api; bank assumes a different API surface (#BLUFF-HELIXQA-BANKS-WRONG-PATHS-001)

test_cases.expected_result: New user created and visible in user list

test_cases.name: Create user with duplicate username rejected

steps.name: Create first user
steps._skip_reason: endpoint POST /api/v1/admin/users does not exist on catalog-api; bank assumes a different API surface (#BLUFF-HELIXQA-BANKS-WRONG-PATHS-001)

steps.name: Create duplicate
steps.expected: 409 Conflict with error about duplicate username
steps._skip_reason: endpoint POST /api/v1/admin/users does not exist on catalog-api; bank assumes a different API surface (#BLUFF-HELIXQA-BANKS-WRONG-PATHS-001)

test_cases.expected_result: Duplicate username rejected with clear error

test_cases.name: Delete user

steps.name: Create expendable user
steps._skip_reason: endpoint POST /api/v1/admin/users does not exist on catalog-api; bank assumes a different API surface (#BLUFF-HELIXQA-BANKS-WRONG-PATHS-001)

steps.name: Verify deletion
steps.expected: Deleted user no longer in list

test_cases.expected_result: User deleted successfully

test_cases.name: Cannot delete the last admin user

steps.name: Attempt to delete sole admin
steps.expected: 403 Forbidden or 409 Conflict with error preventing deletion
steps._original_action: DELETE /api/v1/admin/users/{admin_id} when only one admin exists

test_cases.expected_result: Last admin deletion blocked to prevent lockout

test_cases.name: Update user role

steps.name: Create regular user
steps._skip_reason: endpoint POST /api/v1/admin/users does not exist on catalog-api; bank assumes a different API surface (#BLUFF-HELIXQA-BANKS-WRONG-PATHS-001)

test_cases.expected_result: User role updated to admin

test_cases.name: Reset user password

steps.name: Old password rejected
steps._skip_reason: paired with skipped change-password step (admin password not actually changed); test premise no longer holds

test_cases.expected_result: Password reset works and old password invalidated

test_cases.name: Retrieve storage info

steps.expected: 200 OK with storage roots, total size, file counts

steps.name: Monitor scan progress
steps.expected: Scan progress reported (percentage or file count)

steps.name: Wait for completion
steps.expected: Scan completes with summary of files found

steps._skip_reason: endpoint POST /api/v1/admin/backup does not exist on catalog-api; bank assumes a different API surface (#BLUFF-HELIXQA-BANKS-WRONG-PATHS-001)

steps.name: Modify data
steps.action: Create a new entity after backup

test_cases.name: Collect application logs

steps.name: Verify log format
steps.action: Check log entries have timestamp, level, message fields

test_cases.expected_result: Application logs retrieved with structured format

test_cases.name: Filter logs by level

steps.name: Request warning logs
steps.expected: Warning and above log entries returned

test_cases.expected_result: Log level filtering works correctly

test_cases.name: Filter logs by time range

steps.name: Request logs for last hour
steps.expected: Only log entries from the last hour returned

test_cases.expected_result: Time-range log filtering works

test_cases.name: Log collection returns copy not shared pointer

steps.name: Collect logs again
steps.expected: Same data, independent response (no race condition)

test_cases.expected_result: Log collection returns independent copies

test_cases.name: Configuration precedence: env vars over config

steps.action: Start API with PORT=9090 environment variable

steps.name: Check config file port
steps.action: playwright: assertVisible text=config.json has different port value
steps.expected: Env var takes precedence over config.json
steps._original_action: Verify config.json has different port value

test_cases.expected_result: Environment variables override config file values

steps.expected: All three responses return within timeout

test_cases.expected_result: Concurrent admin operations complete without deadlock
